channel.topic:
WIFEY TRADES
These are mostly macro trades and trades for folks who are busy during the trading day and may need a larger window to take profits. 
These trades also attempt to capture bigger moves which tend to take more time.
I've designed these trades for Wifey as she is terrible at checking on her trades everyday which as it turns out isn't a bad thing 
Hold times: typically at least 1 month

Important event on the internals front occured today. While this has served as a reliable indicator of a new bull in the past we should ofc be cautious & consider these are extraordinary times. Nonetheless, it's an important metric that imho is equally dangerous to ignore. Other notable internals:
-SPX % of stocks > 200MA has sustained > 50 for the longest time since 2021.
-TLT appears to have bottomed at the multi decade trend line I noted last year near 92-94
-Number of stocks making new lows has stopped increasing since Summer.
-Number of stocks making new highs has finally begun moving into positive territory. A newer development.
-DXY at least for now appears to have topped at the multi decade trendline shown here last year. Range bound to down is a big tail wind for the multi national tech stocks.
-Rare breadth thrust linked below
-$SPX has not priced in a recession yet because most signals from NEBR don't agree w/ yield curve's warning of a recession.
-Yield curve inversion has never been wrong about a looming recessions, however, it's when it begins to UN invert that recession fears come to $SPX & we're not quite there YET.
Yield curves can stay inverted for a long period of time.

*This doesn't mean $SPX is not due for a pullback or that these conditions won't be unwound but I thought it important to share these findings with you. 
That's it for now, enjoy your evening fam! ❤️
